Jim Mitchell

Home About

I'm a Certified Salesforce Administrator, Advanced Administrator, Service Cloud Consultant, Sales Cloud Consultant and Platform App Builder with experience in the Service Cloud, Sales Cloud and Marketing Cloud products.

I'm also co-leader for the Salesforce Irvine, CA Developer Group, a Salesforce Service Champion and an AppExchange All-Star.
